prompt: resolver.py has method stubs that raise NotImplementedError. Implement all methods so the tests in test_resolver.py pass. The tests are the only spec — read them carefully.
on_fail: Some tests are still failing. Read the failing test names and assertions carefully. Pay attention to version comparison semantics and cycle detection.

goals.description: Read both files, implement everything in one edit (write tool or single edit replacing the whole class), verify. 4-5 turns.
